name: Hotel Transylvania
description:
🦇 Hotel Transylvania: Open-World RPG 🦇

Step into the monster-filled world of Hotel Transylvania, where players take on the role of a human or monster, navigating the iconic hotel, solving mysteries, and interacting with beloved characters. With a mix of humor, adventure, and supernatural twists, every decision shapes the future of the hotel!

🏰 Explore the Hotel’s Many Floors

🕷️ Lobby & Common Areas – The heart of the hotel, where Dracula greets guests and quests begin.

💃 Ballroom – The place for wild monster parties, talent shows, and banquets.

🍽️ Dining Hall – Help the chef craft bizarre monster dishes… or survive a food fight!

🛏️ Living Quarters – Explore Frankenstein’s, the werewolves’, and more monsters’ rooms.

🔮 Dungeons – A trap-filled underground maze hiding the hotel’s darkest secrets.

🌿 Garden of Shadows – Solve mystical puzzles and discover rare potion ingredients.

🌌 Rooftop Observatory – Mavis’s hideout, filled with stargazing mysteries.

🚪 Human Wing – The newest addition to welcome human guests—with hilarious results!

🧛‍♂️ Expanded Character Interactions

👑 Dracula – Overprotective, neurotic, and hotel-obsessed.

🦇 Mavis – Playful and curious, uncovering family secrets.

😆 Johnny – Goofy, easygoing, and bridging the human-monster gap.

🩸 Dennis – Half-vampire, half-human, always proving himself.

🗡️ Ericka Van Helsing – Former monster hunter turned adventurous partner.

💀 Frankenstein & Eunice – Lovable chaos wrapped in bandages.

🐺 Wayne & Wanda – Overwhelmed parents of dozens of wild werewolf pups.

🎵 Murray (Mummy) – The party monster, hosting legendary dance-offs.

👻 Griffin (Invisible Man) – A prankster who loves to stir up trouble.

🧛‍♂️ Vlad Dracula – Ancient, grumpy, and adjusting to modern monster life.

🔮 Storyline: Unravel the Hotel’s Ancient Curse

Mysterious whispers haunt the hallways. Ancient relics vanish without a trace. An old family curse resurfaces, threatening Dracula’s legacy and the hotel’s very existence.

Join forces with Mavis, Dracula, and the gang to uncover the truth behind the curse. Your choices determine the hotel’s future, from restoring its legacy to transforming it into something new.

🦇 What Will Your Story Be?

👻 Befriend monsters.

🔍 Solve mysteries.

🧛 Protect the legacy of Hotel Transylvania.

The hotel’s fate is in your hands! 🏰✨
creator: Badkid57
